results.title: Ousted Hawaii baseball team begins preparing for next season
results.description: IRVINE, Calif. >> After its season ended on Wednesday at the Big West Tournament, the Hawaii baseball team was informed the next available return flight to Hawaii would be on Saturday.

results.title: Indian Legend Drops MS Dhoni Bombshell, Accuses CSK of Misleading Fans
results.description: Former Indian captain Krishnamachari Srikkanth heavily criticised the Chennai Super Kings management, including captain Ruturaj Gaikwad and coach Stephen Fleming, for misleading fans about MS Dhoni's availability during the IPL season.

results.title: Oleksandr Usyk vs. Rico Verhoeven fight at the pyramids: Predictions, odds
results.description: Oleksandr Usyk is a massive favorite over Rico Verhoeven for their heavyweight bout Saturday, May 23 but some oddsmakers see a chance for the upset.

results.title: Maguire ‘shocked’ but also ‘understood’ hidden Tuchel message about World Cup place
results.description: Harry Maguire somehow 'understood' a hidden Thomas Tuchel message in March, while two Arsenal stars in particular are slammed for being happy.

results.title: Gaming studio Bungie to fire staff amid 'Destiny 2' shutdown
results.description: Bungie, the studio behind the popular Destiny franchise, is reportedly planning a round of layoffs.
